name: EcoCleaner Pro
description: Advanced system optimization and junk cleaning tool for maximum performance.
fullDescription: EcoCleaner Pro is our flagship optimization suite designed to breathe new life into your devices. It implements advanced scanning algorithms to identify and safely remove redundant system files, temporary data, and registry inconsistencies that slow down your experience. With a focus on sustainable computing, it helps extend the lifespan of your hardware by reducing unnecessary wear.
features: Startup manager for faster boot times

name: EcoGuard VPN
description: Ultra-fast, secure, and private browsing with military-grade encryption.
fullDescription: EcoGuard VPN provides a seamless and secure tunnel for your internet traffic. Our global network of high-speed servers ensures that your browsing remains private, even on public Wi-Fi. We use the latest encryption standards and maintain a strict no-logs policy to protect your digital identity.
features: No-logs policy verified by third parties

name: EcoVault Pass
description: Secure password manager with cross-platform sync and biometrics.
fullDescription: EcoVault Pass is your ultimate digital vault. Store passwords, credit cards, and sensitive notes with confidence. All data is encrypted locally on your device before being synced across your platforms, ensuring that only you hold the keys to your information.
features: Auto-fill support for browsers and apps

name: EcoSync Drive
description: Fast and reliable cloud storage synchronization for your files.
fullDescription: EcoSync Drive makes file management simple and secure. Synchronize your important documents across all your devices in real-time. With our advanced versioning system, you can always go back to previous versions of your work, and our end-to-end encryption keeps your files safe in the cloud.
features: File version history up to 30 days
Smart partial sync to save bandwidth
Secure file sharing with link expiry

name: EcoMail Secure
description: End-to-end encrypted email client with advanced spam protection.
fullDescription: EcoMail Secure redefines private communication. Our client uses PGP encryption by default, ensuring that your messages remain private from the moment they are sent until they are opened by the recipient. With built-in tracking protection and advanced spam filters, your inbox stays clean and secure.

name: EcoTest Pro
fullDescription: This is a test app to verify the dynamic admin panel.
